scenarios.title: Materials Science and Crystal Structure Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks involving pymatgen, computational materials structures, local environments, entries, Materials Project/COD/OPTIMADE data, surfaces, Pourbaix, diffraction, spectra, pmg CLI, or pymatgen configuration.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained routing and workflow references for using pymatgen APIs and CLIs safely across major computational materials workflows.
scenarios.read_when: pymatgen, pymatgen-core, Structure, Molecule, Lattice, CrystalNN, ComputedEntry, MPRester, Materials Project, Pourbaix, WulffShape, XRDCalculator, pmg, .pmgrc.yaml, POTCAR
scenarios.best_for: Structure/local-environment analysis, compatibility-corrected entries, battery and Borg workflows, external materials data planning, surfaces/interfaces/electrochemistry, spectra/diffraction/visualization, and command-line/configuration safety.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is generic molecular drug-discovery chemistry, molecular generative modeling, non-materials simulation trajectories, or package development unrelated to pymatgen APIs/CLIs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `pymatgen` when the request names pymatgen or materials/crystal/phase/stability terms. Use the external-data sub-skill before live API calls, the CLI/config sub-skill before persistent settings or POTCAR operations, and the domain sub-skill that owns the resulting analysis.
